goal: Move the real hook implementation files under the hook namespace while preserving existing top-level imports through compatibility wrappers.
constraints: Preserve existing import paths for callers and tests
Adjust moved-file imports and path logic to match the deeper package location
behavioral_changes: The real hook implementations now live under chip_labs.lab_hooks.
The old top-level hook modules now act as compatibility wrappers.
The hook namespace API now depends on the moved implementation modules directly.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from chip_labs.evaluate import evaluate; from chip_labs.lab_hooks.evaluate import evaluate as moved_evaluate; print('hook-move-imports-ok')"
follow_up: Apply the same move pattern to the other surfaces only after their namespace seams are stable.
Once the whole surface has moved, tighten namespace imports and remove redundant wrapper-only indirection only when safe.
